title: pr-should-include-tests: use GitHub label, not commit text
body:
...to allow bypassing the check. Just like on podman.

Also, bring up to code:
  - grep -F, not fgrep
  - fix regression test script (was using wrong branch envariable)
  - add new test case

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat what was that push for? This was passing CI when I left it two weeks ago

@edsantiago it was saying the same as it is now.  The message "This branch is out-of-date with the base branch" is displaying along with the shiny "Update branch" button that's just begging to be pushed.  This time I'll try to control myself and will leave the shiny "must be pushed" button alone.
